description_long: This is a modern electric kettle with a sleek, cylindrical body made primarily of black plastic, featuring a glossy finish. The kettle is equipped with a large, ergonomically designed side-mounted handle, which is slightly arched for easy gripping. A blue button is visible on the top rear of the handle, likely serving as a power or lid release switch. The lid is domed and appears to be removable, fitting snugly into the top opening. The kettle sits on a flat, integrated base that connects to a power outlet via a visible cord, suggesting it is designed for countertop use. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, with no visible decorative patterns or embellishments.
description: A sleek, black electric kettle with a domed removable lid, arched side handle, and glossy finish, sitting on a flat base with a power cord. The design is modern and minimalistic, with a blue button accent.
description_view_0: The kettle is seen from a rear-side angle, highlighting the arched handle, blue button, and the power cord plugged into the wall.
description_view_1: A top-down view showing the flat, rectangular base and the circular top of the kettle, with no handle or spout details visible.
description_view_2: A side view displaying the full profile of the kettle, the handle, the domed lid, and the power cord extending from the base.
description_view_3: A direct rear view focusing on the back of the kettle and the handle, with the lid and base clearly visible.
attribute_lid_design: domed removable lid with no visible knob
